name: Success, transaction journals created
description: Order-placement accrual. Send the order's transaction(s) with the appliedPromotions returned by the pricing call; Loyalty creates the transaction journals and accrues rewards. Response matches the documented Promotion Reward Application output exactly: { transactionJournalList: [ Transaction Journal Details ] } where each item has id + discountsAppliedList[] / gamesAssignedList[] / voucherIssuedList[].
notes: Response shape is doc-confirmed (Promotion Reward Application output, Transaction Journal Details[]): each journal carries id + discountsAppliedList/gamesAssignedList/voucherIssuedList. The request shape (transactionJournalList[].appliedPromotions[]) is also doc-aligned. The adapter (LoyaltyService.applyReward) fires this at order placement and does not parse the body.
